assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading the control plane first before any node pools
assertions.reason: Response clearly states Phase 1 as control plane upgrade and Phase 2 as node pool upgrades, with explicit step-by-step commands for control plane first

assertions.expectation: Provides a specific node pool upgrade order with rationale (coordinating→data→master, or similar logical sequence)
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states upgrade order as 'Coordinators → Data → Masters (least critical to most critical)' with clear rationale provided

assertions.expectation: Addresses PV safety: regional pd-ssd volumes can reattach to nodes in other zones, which is good for upgrades
assertions.reason: Response mentions 'Regional pd-ssd PVs: Survive node replacement, data persists across upgrades' and explains why data is safe with regional pd-ssd volumes

assertions.expectation: Recommends setting PDB for Elasticsearch master nodes to ensure quorum (minAvailable=2 for 3-master setup)
assertions.reason: Response provides specific PDB configuration with minAvailable: 2 for master nodes to maintain quorum of 2 out of 3 masters

assertions.expectation: Recommends maxSurge=1, maxUnavailable=0 for all ES node pools (conservative, data-safe)
assertions.reason: Response explicitly sets --max-surge-upgrade 1 and --max-unavailable-upgrade 0 for all three node pools (coordinator, data, master)

assertions.expectation: Advises verifying Elasticsearch cluster health (green status) between each node pool upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes cluster health verification commands after each phase and between node pool upgrades using curl commands to check cluster health

assertions.expectation: Mentions checking PV reclaim policy is set to Retain (not Delete) as a safety measure
assertions.reason: Response includes specific kubectl command to verify PV reclaim policy is set to 'Retain' in the pre-upgrade checklist

assertions.expectation: Includes kubectl commands for checking StatefulSet rollout status
assertions.reason: Response includes 'kubectl get statefulsets -n elasticsearch' command in validation section to check for stuck StatefulSets

assertions.expectation: Recommends taking an Elasticsearch snapshot backup before starting
assertions.reason: Response includes taking application-level backup as first step in Phase 1 and mentions cluster backup in pre-upgrade checklist
